title: LLM Logging Pipeline with Privacy Filters
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: LLM Token Efficiency
description: Interactive Mermaid flowchart of an LLM logging pipeline with PII detection, redaction, cost computation, and retention.

learningObjectives: Implement an LLM logging pipeline that captures every required field while satisfying PII redaction and retention requirements.

pedagogical.teachingStrategy: Interactive flowchart with live JSONL output
keyQuestions: What fields are required in every log line?
Which path runs when PII is detected?
How does truncation length affect storage cost?
commonMisconceptions: PII redaction is async — it must be synchronous before the line is emitted.
prompt_hash can be computed from the redacted prompt — it must be computed from the original.
